Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: If we implement this in Langchain

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangChain is Stateless: It doesn't inherently track data across complex non-linear steps unless manually handled

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangGraph is Stateful: It uses a "State" object (dictionary/Pydantic model) that is passed between nodes.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Each node can read and update this state, making information sharing seamless

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangGraph allows workflows to pause and wait for external triggers (e.g., waiting 7 days for job applications or waiting for a user email).

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: It can save the current state and resume exactly where it left of

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangGraph is designed for long-running workflows:

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Retries: Automatically retry a node if a small error occurs (e.g., API downtime).

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Checkpoints: It takes "snapshots" of the state. If the server crashes, it can resume from the

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: last successful node instead of starting from scratch.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangGraph treats humans as "first-class citizens." It can pause execution indefinitely for human approval

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (e.g., approving a Job Description) and resume once the human provides input.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: You can replace a single node in a large graph with another entire graph. This enables:

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Multi-Agent Systems: Different agents (nodes) handling specific sub-tasks [01:12:39].

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Reusability: Using the same logic (like an "Approval Flow") in multiple parts of a larger system

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 7)Observability: refers to how easily you can monitor, debug, and understand what your workflow is doing at runtime.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: While LangSmith works with both, LangGraph provides deeper integration. It records the entire timeline of node executions, state changes,

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and human interactions, making production-grade debugging and auditing much easier compared to LangChain's "Gloo Code

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: LangGraph is an orchestration framework built on top of LangChain. It represents workflows as a Graph:

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Nodes: Represent individual tasks or Python functions.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Edges: Define the control flow (how you move from one node to another).

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: State: A central object accessible to all nodes to store and update data.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
